'''Oovo''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] located in the [[Oovo system/Legends|Oovo system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Tharin sector/Legends|Tharin sector]]. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by an [[Oovo asteroid belt|asteroid belt]] which contained the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[Oovo IV/Legends|Oovo IV]], which housed the maximum security [[Prison/Legends|prison]] named [[Desolation Alley]].

Oovo's asteroid counterpart was decimated by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].
